$note: Contract notes only. Updated for @adhd/agent-registry Decision 5 (head/version split) so the compiler builds against the corrected component shape. Does NOT alter this plan's state.json/dag.json.

registry-consumed.how: ONE shared SQLite handle ([inv:one-db-handle]); delegates ordering/pin/context to CompositionStore.resolveComposition rather than re-evaluating.

component-model.shape: head/version split (Decision 5): registry_components (identity, slug PK) + registry_component_versions (history, version_id PK, UNIQUE(slug, version)). The old single registry_prompt_components (slug, version) table no longer exists.
component-model.resolveComposition: returns ResolvedComponent[] whose component.version is the human version and component.versionId is the registry_component_versions.version_id surrogate. Ordering/pin/context semantics are unchanged by the split.
component-model.version_pin: on registry_agent_components is a registry_component_versions.version_id (enforced nullable FK), not a human version number; null = latest-at-resolve.
component-model.composed_prompts.component_versions: remains a JSON map {componentSlug: version} of human version numbers — the audit map the compiler writes. Use ComponentStore.resolveVersionId(slug, version) if a stable version_id is needed.
